message:
fix(cx): wake cancel_waker when setting cancellation flag

cancel_with() and cancel_fast() set the fast_cancel flag and
cancel_reason but did not wake the stored cancel_waker, so futures
parked on cancellation notification could remain asleep indefinitely
after a cancel request. Clone the waker before dropping the inner
lock and wake it immediately after the flag is published.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
